title: 2026-02-05 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 24.26
description: New daily signal for 2026-02-05: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 24.26/100, signaling a low pressure regime as equity stress and volatility shaped the daily read. See the chart pack, score regime, and what drove the latest reading.
hero_summary: The daily signal helps separate noise from persistent multi-factor stress. On 2026-02-05, the score printed 24.26/100 in the low regime, with equity stress and volatility doing most of the work.
